message:
chore: add .cargo/config.toml with 16MB stack for debug builds

The 56-variant Commands enum causes stack overflow in debug/test builds
with the default 8MB stack. Setting RUST_MIN_STACK=16777216 via cargo
config ensures test runs succeed without per-invocation env vars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# The wa CLI has a 56-variant Commands enum that causes stack overflow
+# in debug/test builds with the default 8MB stack. 16MB is sufficient.
+[env]
+RUST_MIN_STACK = "16777216"
